The '''Nella 342 light freighter''' was produced by [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation]].<ref name="PAP" />

==History==
An older model of light freighter known for its durability, reliability, and rugged construction - the ship was nonetheless discontinued after the market standards for freighters were redefined by the introduction of the YT-1300.<ref name="PAP" />
